untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (Advance Block candlestick pattern identification) and yearly range position analysis, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based indicators and operators. The signal also references market regime detection (bull/bear market) and yearly high/low positioning that would require custom pattern detection logic and annual range calculations not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The Advance Block pattern is a multi-candle candlestick formation that requires visual pattern recognition beyond simple price comparisons. Entry conditions depend on: (1) identifying the pattern itself, (2) determining yearly range position, (3) market regime context. These require candlestick pattern detection libraries or custom bar-sequence analysis. The generic long/short entries above represent only directional breakout logic, not the actual pattern confirmation.
